channel.title: A.M. Rinas | Blog
channel.description: Insights, research, and guides by A.M. Rinas.

item.title: Adding Google Chat to the Ubuntu Desktop Bar
item.description: To add Google Chat as a shortcut to your Ubuntu desktop bar, create a custom desktop entry.

item.title: Airbyte Local Installation Steps
item.description: Steps for installing Airbyte locally and handling common permission errors during setup.

item.title: Apache HTTP Server Troubleshooting Notes
item.description: Troubleshooting notes for Apache HTTP Server including syntax checking, resolving SSLSessionCache errors, and checking error logs.

item.title: Adding a Custom Node to n8n in Docker
item.description: A step-by-step guide on how to inject a custom node into an n8n Docker container by mounting volumes and restarting the service.

item.title: Linux, Maven, and Git Cheat Sheet
item.description: A compilation of useful commands for Linux file searching, SSH proxy jumps, Maven proxy settings, and Git tagging.

item.title: MongoDB Backup & Restore with Docker
item.description: A complete guide to backing up and restoring MongoDB databases running inside Docker containers using mongodump and mongorestore.

item.title: How to Disable Auto-Start for a Docker Container
item.description: Learn how to stop Docker containers from starting automatically after a machine reboot by updating restart policies.

item.title: Why Docker Builds Fail Differently on Linux and Windows
item.description: A practical breakdown of Docker build issues across Linux and Windows environments.

item.title: Understanding .gitattributes: Solving Cross-Platform Line Ending Problems
item.description: A practical guide to .gitattributes and Git line ending normalization between Windows and Linux systems.

item.title: Fast Video Trimming on Linux Using FFmpeg (No Re-encoding)
item.description: A practical Linux guide to trimming videos instantly using FFmpeg without re-encoding.

item.title: MySQL 8.0 Binary Installation and MariaDB Cleanup Guide
item.description: A professional engineering guide to installing MySQL 8.0 on Linux from generic binaries. Learn step-by-step how to manage unprivileged system accounts, set tight directory flags, resolve libaio runtime dependencies, and purge conflicting MariaDB footprints.

item.title: Introduction: Overview of Grafana, Prometheus, and Node Exporter
item.description: Grafana: Grafana is an open-source platform for monitoring and observability that allows you to create, explore, and share dashboards and data visuali...

item.title: Creating Docker Networks for Container Communication
item.description: Learn how Docker bridge networks work and how to connect multiple containers securely.

item.title: How to Enable and Monitor the MySQL General Log
item.description: Verify the general log by checking the log file at /var/log/mysql/mysql-general.log for recorded queries....

item.title: Fixing \
item.description: Step-by-step systems debugging guide to resolve the Java HPI library dependency error 'Could not initialize Java Virtual Machine' after deploying an Oracle JDK binary on Linux kernels.
